generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring the hoist swing."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring air wind speed affecting the crane operation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderCart : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder on cart stepper motor measuring position and current."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderHoist : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder on hoist stepper motor measuring position and current."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller reads sensors and publishes their data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoTelemetryTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartMotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderCart
]

instance HoistMotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderHoist
]

instance ArduinoTelemetryTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance SwivelAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurement data transmitted to TimescaleDB and MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurement data transmitted to TimescaleDB and MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance CartMotorTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart motor position and current telemetry data transmitted to TimescaleDB and MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance HoistMotorTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist motor position and current telemetry data transmitted to TimescaleDB and MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance ArduinoTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "General telemetry data from Arduino transmitted to TimescaleDB and MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoTelemetryTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance DatastoreTimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB container for time-series logging of crane telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for internal publishing of telemetry data."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance GantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for interfacing with the crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component responsible for generating optimized trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine running physical simulations of the crane."
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalSimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation engine that compares real and simulated trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino device reading physical sensors and publishing telemetry via MQTT."
]

instance KiCadCustomShield : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom driver board shield designed in KiCad for motor control."
]

instance CADModelGantryCrane : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD model of the crane geometry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibModule
]

instance KinematicModelCrane : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model derived from CAD for trajectory planning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerator
]

instance SimulationTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation traces of crane behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Validation metrics computed by the continuous validation service."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEngine
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates optimized crane trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationOutcomeInsight, ExecuteTrajectoryOptimizationAction
]

instance PhysicalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that simulates the crane’s physical behavior, producing simulation traces."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationTraceData
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing real and simulated trajectories, generating validation metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, ValidationBreachNotificationInsight, ValidationMetricsData
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs telemetry into TimescaleDB for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ResearchTeachingSupportInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard service visualizing real-time and historical trajectory performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPerformanceInsight, SwingBehaviorInsight
]

instance TrajectoryPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory performance analysis."
]

instance SwingBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of crane swing behavior over time."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults based on deviation between real and simulated trajectories."
]

instance ValidationBreachNotificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notifications sent when validation metrics breach thresholds."
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Outcome of trajectory optimization, showing improved performance."
]

instance ResearchTeachingSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical logs used for research and teaching decision support."
]

instance ExecuteTrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that triggers trajectory optimization and updates command stream."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SendValidationNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that sends operator notifications when validation thresholds are breached."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart stepper motor controlled via TMC4671‑Eval driver."
]

instance HoistStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist stepper motor controlled via TMC4671‑Eval driver."
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet actuator at hoist end for gripping containers."
]

instance GantryCraneDTEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotorActuator, HoistStepperMotorActuator, ElectromagnetActuator, SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, MotorEncoderCart, MotorEncoderHoist, ArduinoMicrocontroller, DatastoreTimescaleDB, MQTTBroker, TrajectoryGenerationService, PhysicalSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory commands (position, velocity profiles) are generated by the trajectory generator service, passed through the control application, and sent to the motors via the crane interface; the continuous validation service may trigger operator alerts through the dashboard but does not directly command the hardware"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A containerized architecture where the physical system (crane, controllers, sensors) is linked via the crane interface to a suite of application containers (control app, logging app, human‑machine interface) that interact with the digital twin side (database, MQTT broker, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, continuous validation) all orchestrated through a Docker Compose stack on a personal computer"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (CAD model creation, kinematic modeling), manufacturing (assembly of the physical crane and electronics), and operation (runtime monitoring, continuous validation, and adaptation of control parameters during use)"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation compares real and simulated trajectories, computing distance metrics against a user‑defined threshold; when the threshold is breached operators are notified via the dashboard; the fidelity of the kinematic model is anchored to the CAD geometry and updated as the physical system evolves"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Serial communication (Arduino UART) between the crane interface and physical electronics; MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) broker for intra‑service messaging; TimescaleDB accessed over PostgreSQL protocol; all container communication occurs over Docker‑managed network on localhost"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment using Docker Compose on a single personal computer; vertical stack includes TimescaleDB, Mosquitto broker, Grafana, and six application containers; source code and configuration hosted on public GitHub repository"
]
